name: North Korea
headline: North Korea FLOOR-STATE CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical. FDD May 7 analysis: Russian security assistance creating problems on Korean Peninsula. Russia reportedly improved KN-23 accuracy from 500-1,500m to 50-100m. April 19 cluster-munition payload missile test (5 missiles at Sea of Japan island target) observed by Kim Jong-un + daughter. 2026 missile tests already exceed all of 2025. North Korea continues 14K+ troop deployment to Kursk; Russian battlefield testing enables KN-23 sophistication transfer back to DPRK. Floor sustained.

BND.rationale: Floor sustained. Cluster-munition missile testing + 14K+ troops deployed to Russian battlefield + KN-23 accuracy upgrade (10x improvement) sustain floor-anchor pattern of indiscriminate-weapons + state-facilitation-of-foreign-conflict.

evidence.finding: Russia improved KN-23 accuracy from 500-1,500m to 50-100m; sophistication knowledge sent back to DPRK. Russian battlefield testing enabling DPRK missile upgrades.
Massive ballistic missile barrage amid US-ROK drills; 2026 tests already exceed all of 2025.
April 19: Kim Jong-un + daughter observed 5-missile cluster-munition test at Sea of Japan island target.
Kim Jong-un December 2025 order: boost missile production in 2026.

keyEvidence: Russian KN-23 accuracy upgrade: 500-1,500m to 50-100m (10x improvement).
April 19 cluster-munition test observed by Kim Jong-un + daughter.
14K+ DPRK troops deployed to Kursk (Russian battlefield).
rationale: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Russian security-assistance loop (Russia tests DPRK missiles in Ukraine → improves accuracy → returns knowledge to DPRK) sustains the canonical floor-anchor pattern of state-facilitation-of-foreign-conflict + indiscriminate-weapons-testing. Cluster-munition payload testing is canonical floor evidence. Already at floor, no downward movement available. Math: 8/8 = 1.0 → ((1.0-1)/4)*100 = 0.0.
whyHeadline: North Korea floor sustained; Russian KN-23 accuracy upgrade returned to DPRK; cluster-munition testing accelerates.

dominantDimension.note: BND remains canonical floor-anchor (indiscriminate weapons + state-facilitation-of-foreign-conflict).

nextForwardSignal.label: Further DPRK-Russia weapons-transfer documentation; UNSC engagement

boundaryWatchResolution: Floor state; no boundary movement available.
